openSpec.summary: Add validated priority field to in-memory Todo API create/update paths.

implementation.summary: Flask handlers validate and store priority; pytest covers happy path and rejection.

verificationNotes: POST /todos with priority=high and GET /todos to inspect.
technicalRisks: In-memory store resets on process restart (acceptable for demo).
alternativesConsidered: Numeric priority 1-5 — rejected for weaker clarity in demo AC.
